NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542, Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

No appearance by the Petitioner: Michael Countee.

No appearance by the Respondent: Morgan Countee Jr.

There being no appearances, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Reset To Sep-17-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Katy Bersamin/CSR#11722, Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petitioner: Michael Countee present in pro per.

No appearance by the Respondent.

Petitioner sworn.

There being no proof of service, the Court continued the matter to Thursday, September 17, 2009 at 11:00 a.m. in Department 204. The reissuance was signed in open court and will expire on September 17, 2009.
